name: Bojti Halikraleves (Spawn Soup for Lent)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the vegetables and cut them into small pieces.
2. In a pot of about 2 quarts of water, add salt, bay leaves, and peppercorns.
3. Cook the vegetables until they are almost soft.
4. Make a roux by melting butter in a separate pan, then adding flour and cooking for only a few minutes, keeping it very light.
5. Add paprika to the roux and whisk in half a cup of cold water.
6. Pour the roux into the vegetable mixture and bring back to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to a simmer.
8. Add fish pieces and fish head, then simmer the soup for 10 minutes.
9. Add spawn and cook for another 5 minutes.
10. Pour in the vinegar; just before serving, stir in the sour cream.
11. Adjust salt and vinegar to your taste.
Note: During Lent, many Hungarians consume a lot of fish. This soup is a good way to start a Lenten meal with leftover fish pieces, bones, and heads.
